Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $224,543,292Details
International Box Office $207,689,718
Worldwide Box Office $432,233,010
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,558,512
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,942,692
Total $14,501,204
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Shang-Chi must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$75,388,688 (33.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,300 opening theaters/4,300 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $264,064,673

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 3rd, 2021 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: September 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Switzerland)
September 1st, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
September 1st, 2021 (Wide), released as Shang-Chi e la leggenda dei Dieci Anelli (Italy)
September 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Sweden)
September 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Norway)
Video Release: November 12th, 2021 by Disney+
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence and action, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2690 (cert #53309), 7/21/2021)
Running Time: 132 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe
Geographical setting: Macau
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Immortality, Martial Arts, Origin Story, The Past Catching up with You
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Target audience: Asian-Americans
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Shang-Chi must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.
